description: TDD enforcement hooks - requires tests before implementation

hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js"

export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js"
